title: capsella incisura
intro: Capsella incisura, also known as shear's cress or shepherd's cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Capsella incisura include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Capsella incisura include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
